'''''Aris Brace''''' was an independently owned [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighter]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] held the [[Corellian Merchants' Guild/Legends|Corellian Merchants' Guild]] record for continuous cargo runs over five [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]].<ref name="SWS" />
